title: OpenClaw Agent Templates Community Launched
description: mergisi launches awesome-openclaw-agents repository with 30+ production-ready AI agent templates across 19 categories, featuring SOUL.md personality configs.

title: OpenClaw Security Hardening Review
description: Comprehensive security audit of OpenClaw Mission Control including rate limiting, Redis-backed throttling, non-root Docker containers, token redaction, and proxy header handling.

title: Mobile-Responsive Dashboard Released
description: OpenClaw dashboard receives full mobile-responsive redesign with collapsible sidebar, touch-friendly navigation, and Cypress e2e tests for mobile workflows.

title: macOS and Linux systemd Support
description: OpenClaw Gateway adds native macOS (launchd) and Linux (systemd) boot integration with auth token re-sync capabilities and documentation.

title: Agent OS File System Spec Published
description: OpenClaw community publishes standardized Agent OS file system specification for cross-platform agent workspace organization and persistence.

title: Gateway Offline Recovery Fix
description: Critical fix for OpenClaw Gateway offline state detection and automatic reconnection with host OS Python runtime fallback.

title: Social Media Creator Agents Added
description: OpenClaw template library expands with TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts creator agents with automated content generation pipelines.

title: Model Migration and Claude Skills
description: OpenClaw adds model migration configs, memory-wiki persistence, troubleshooting skills, and 5 Claude Code-specific agent configurations.
